Name: Mayor
Text: Noah, over here! You came really quickly. Thanks as always.

Name: Noah
Text: So, you couldn’t find the cause of the fire? And the fire still hasn’t been put out?

Name: Mayor
Text: That’s right… A big fire broke out at this house last night, but…

Name: Mayor
Text: The homeowner was too busy playing games and didn’t even notice.

Name: Noah
Text: He didn’t even realize the fire had started because he was playing games?

Name: Mayor
Text: Exactly… I don’t know what’s going on…

Name: Noah
Text: If the fire had started while he was at home,

Name: Noah
Text: He should have reported it, and it could have been extinguished quickly.

Name: Mayor
Text: Yes, exactly. They say the homeowner spends all day lost in games.

Name: Mayor
Text: Anyway, I have no clue how to put out this big fire…

Name: Mayor
Text: On top of that, we need to find out the cause to determine if it was an accident or a crime…

Name: Noah
Text: Don’t worry. I’ll extinguish the fire and figure out the cause.
